node.data: {"V31":{"lit":"ար<lb xml:id=\"l104330806\" facs=\"#z104330806\" n=\"3\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>դարացուցանեն","line":{"facs":"#z104330805","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104330805","n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"20180813_132620"},"n":"արդարացուցանեն"},"M3531":{"lit":"արդարացուցանեն","line":{"facs":"#z104368016","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104368016","n":"10"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"3531.0270a"},"n":"արդարացուցանեն"},"M8699":{"lit":"արդարացուցանեն","line":{"facs":"#z103946228","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103946228","n":"8"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8699-126a"},"n":"արդարացուցանեն"},"M7993":{"lit":"արդարաց<lb xml:id=\"l104197361\" facs=\"#z104197361\" n=\"5\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>ուցանեն","line":{"facs":"#z104197360","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104197360","n":"4"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"7993.0228"},"n":"արդարացուցանեն"}}
